title: Replace Subscription flow with invite code authentication

requirements.summary: Replace ICP Ledger verification flow with invite code authentication UI in SubscriptionPage
acceptanceCriteria: The Subscription page shows an 'Enter Invite Code' heading and a single invite code text input.
The 'Activate' button is disabled when the input is empty and enabled when non-empty.
Entering exactly '156853c40cb612680accef359c70d569cc9cd60453f5b055bf69e4ce87cf67a5' and clicking 'Activate' triggers the backend subscription activation call.
After successful activation, the isSubscribed React Query cache is invalidated and the user is redirected to the dashboard.
Entering any other string displays an inline error: 'Invalid invite code. Please check and try again.'
No treasury address, ICP transfer instructions, block index input, or 'Verify & Activate' button appears anywhere on the page.
If the user is already subscribed, the form is hidden and an 'Active Subscription' badge is displayed.
The page visual style matches the existing dark fintech glassmorphism theme.

file_operations.description: Replace the entire ICP Ledger block-verification UI with an invite code authentication form. Remove all treasury address display, ICP transfer instructions, block index input field, and 'Verify & Activate' button. Implement: (1) 'Enter Invite Code' heading with instructional text; (2) single text input labeled 'Invite Code'; (3) 'Activate' button enabled only when input is non-empty; (4) local validation comparing trimmed input against hardcoded string '156853c40cb612680accef359c70d569cc9cd60453f5b055bf69e4ce87cf67a5'; (5) on match, call the activation mutation hook (from REQ-38) to trigger backend recordPayment, then invalidate isSubscribed cache and redirect to dashboard; (6) on mismatch, display inline error 'Invalid invite code. Please check and try again.'; (7) if already subscribed, hide form and show 'Active Subscription' badge. Maintain existing dark glassmorphism visual theme using GlassCard and existing CSS classes.

requirements.summary: Add activation mutation hook for invite-code-triggered subscription activation
acceptanceCriteria: A mutation hook is available in useQueries.ts for SubscriptionPage to call after local invite code validation.
The hook calls the backend actor's subscription activation function.
On success, the `isSubscribed` query cache is invalidated.
`isPending`, `isSuccess`, and `isError` states are correctly exposed to the consumer.
If the actor is not available, the hook returns an appropriate error rather than silently failing.

file_operations.description: Add a new mutation hook `useActivateByInviteCode` that: (1) obtains the backend actor via useActor; (2) calls actor.recordPayment() with no arguments (the backend will accept this as a subscription activation signal); (3) on success, invalidates the 'isSubscribed' React Query cache key to trigger App.tsx subscription re-check and automatic redirect to dashboard; (4) exposes isPending, isSuccess, isError, and error states for UI feedback; (5) handles actor unavailability by throwing a descriptive error. This hook replaces the need for useVerifyAndActivateSubscription in the new invite-code flow.
